evals.name: single-edit
evals.prompt: I just modified src/index.php — added a new header comment. Project is at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync it to the remote server. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: One scp upload command + mkdir -p for /var/www/html/src; uses -i key; summary mentions index.php uploaded to web.example.com

evals.name: batch-edit
evals.prompt: I edited 3 files: src/app.js, src/utils.js, assets/style.css. Project at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync them to the remote. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: 3 scp upload commands (or one grouped); mkdir for src and assets; batched summary listing all 3 files

evals.name: delete
evals.prompt: I just deleted old/deprecated.js locally — it is no longer on disk. Project at <MOCK_DIR>. Propagate the deletion to the remote. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: One ssh 'rm -f' command targeting /home/deploy/app/old/deprecated.js; summary mentions deleted

evals.name: sensitive-env
evals.prompt: I edited .env in the project at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync to the remote. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line. If you would normally ask for confirmation, print the exact confirmation question prefixed with 'CONFIRM: ' on its own line and assume the answer is NO, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: A CONFIRM line asking to upload .env; NO scp command issued; summary says .env skipped at user request

evals.name: ignore-pattern
evals.prompt: I edited two files: node_modules/lodash/index.js and src/main.js. Project at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync them. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: Only src/main.js uploaded; node_modules/lodash/index.js silently skipped (matches ignore pattern); summary shows 1 uploaded

evals.name: ftp-protocol
evals.prompt: I edited public/index.html in the project at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync it. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.

evals.name: no-config
evals.prompt: I edited src/foo.js in the project at <MOCK_DIR>. Sync it. DRY RUN: do NOT execute scp/ssh/curl. Print every remote command you would run prefixed with 'CMD: ' on its own line, then give your normal summary.
evals.expected_output: No sftp.json found — skill should NOT attempt any upload; reports that project has no SFTP config and stops
